title: Vinland Survival
description: Vanilla Experience I Performance Boost I Actions & Stuff Features I Visual & Sound Overhaul l Revamped Vanilla Structures I QoL Enhancements I Embark on an epic quest to find Vinland, a legendary land of peace and freedom
body:
###  **<center> FIND VINLAND IN THIS MINECRAFT ADVENTURE </center>**
 
____________________________________________________________________________________
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa9e804ec6c5d500502038b6900325a857a40a14.jpeg)

______________________________________________________________________________________________
**<center>Vinland Survival** is a modpack that improves on the vanilla Minecraft experience. We aim for performance and quality of life features, while introducing visual and auditory enhancements. Dive into a world where gameplay is smoother, features are more intuitive, and the sights and sounds of Minecraft are elevated to new heights. Join us on this journey to explore the beauty of Vinland and embark on an unforgettable adventure in the world of Minecraft</center>
______________________________________________________________________________________________
**_<center>The best minecraft vanilla journey</center>_**

_You awaken amidst the vast, untamed wilderness, where the whispers of ancient sagas linger in the air like echoes of forgotten dreams. In this realm of untold wonders and perilous trials, the call of adventure beckons you forth, igniting the flame of discovery within your heart._

_As you navigate the rugged landscape, you realize that survival is not merely a matter of strength and endurance but a journey of self-discovery and exploration. The quest for Vinland, a legendary land of promise and opportunity, becomes your guiding light, driving you forward through the trials and tribulations that lie ahead._

_But beyond the allure of uncharted territories and the thrill of conquest lies a deeper truth: Vinland is more than just a destination - it is a sanctuary of peace and freedom. In Vinland, the chains of warfare and slavery are shattered, replaced by the fertile soil of liberty and tranquillity. Here, the notion that we are all slaves to something dissipates as we find ourselves liberated to embrace the beauty of existence and the boundless possibilities of a world unburdened by oppression._

_With each step towards Vinland, you inch closer to a realm where the soul finds solace and the spirit soars. For in the haven of Vinland, you will finally know true liberation and the timeless allure of freedom's embrace._

_**<center>This is where your saga truly begins.</center>**_
______________________________________________________________________________________________

## ✨ **Resource Packs**

Vinland transforms the visual atmosphere of Minecraft with carefully chosen resource packs that enhance every detail. From rich, realistic foliage to immersive animations, these added packs breathe new life into the game's textures and environments. Designed with compatibility and performance in mind, the packs work seamlessly together to create a visually stunning experience.

**<center>📖 IF THE RESOURCE PACKS AREN'T PRE LOADED, USE THIS ORDER TO PREVENT COMPATIBILITY ISSUES 📖**</center>

<details>
<summary>Open For More Information</summary>

- [Simple Grass Flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers) by JamieCubed - Use at a higher priority level than VanillaTweaks
- VanillaTweaks (custom build)

**📖 IMPORTANT INFORMATION**

The following resource packs were combined into the resource pack called **VanillaTweaks** to resolve some compatibility issues between them. So please **use the matchable resource instead of the following 2** (they are still included in the folder as their authors own all their rights). Thank you for the incredible work:
- [Mandala's GUI - Dark mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode) by CesarZorak
- [Vanilla Experience+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-exp) by Kryqu
  
</details>


## 👁️ Shaderpacks

## ⚡ Performance & Optimization

This modpack delivers a smoother, faster and more responsive Minecraft experience. With an optimised suite of performance-enhancing mods, every aspect of the game is tuned, from chunk loading and rendering to reducing server load. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes or diving into complex builds, these improvements work behind the scenes to minimise lag, improve frame rates, and improve your gameplay.

<details>
<summary>Open For More Information</summary>
  
- [Badoptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) | Fixes and improves poorly optimized vanilla mechanics
- [Blanket](https://modrinth.com/mod/blanket) | Optimizes texture loading for improved performance
- [Chunks fade in](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunks-fade-in) | Smooths chunk transition while loading the world
- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) | Groups nearby xp entities to reduce server load
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) | Improves chunk management for smoother performance
- [Cull Less Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves) | Reduces leaf processing to improve performance
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) | Provides debugging tools for diagnosing performance issues
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) | Dynamically adjusts frame rate for better performance
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) | Optimizes block entity processing for smoother gameplay
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) | Removes invisible entities to alleviate server load
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) | Increases chunk processing efficiency to enhance performance
- [FeyTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/feytweaks) | Small performance improvements and gameplay tweaks
- [GpuTape](https://modrinth.com/mod/gputape) | Fix VRAM leaks
- [Highlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/highlight) | Highlights and fixes certain elements for easy identification during gameplay
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) | Reduces input latency for faster player response
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) | Optimizes rendering for improved performance
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) | Improves network performance to reduce latency
- [Ksyxis](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksyxis) | Speed up the loading of your world
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) | Improves server performance through various optimizations
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) | Fixes memory leaks to prevent performance issues
- [Mixintrace](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixintrace) | adds a list of mixins to classes in the stack trace to crash reports
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) | Fixes bugs and optimizations for improved performance
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) | Increases efficiency of entity removal for better performance
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) | Reduces game-generated noise to improve performance
- [Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium) | Improves rendering performance for smoother gameplay
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) | Implements an optimized rendering engine for better performance
- [Sodium Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-dynamic-lights) | An unofficial Forge/multiloader port of LambDynamicLights that integrates with Sodium
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) | Provides additional features for the Sodium mod
- [Sodium Leaf Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodiumleafculling) | Smart leaf culling algorithm (Only on 1.21.1)
- [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak) | Optimizes thread usage to improve game performance
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) | Improves performance on servers with many players
- [LMD](https://modrinth.com/plugin/lmd) | Improves performance by tweaking mob despawn rules 
- [Unloaded Activity](https://modrinth.com/mod/unloaded-activity) | When certain blocks such as crops or furnaces get out of simulation distance this mod will keep track of that
- [Fastquit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit) | Lets you return to the Title Screen early while your world is still saving in the background

## 👍 Action & Stuff Features in Java

Vinland Survival incorporates mechanics inspired by the Actions & Stuff resource pack from Minecraft Bedrock Edition. While not a direct port, this modpack brings similar immersive features to the Java Edition, including enhanced animations, detailed textures, and improved performance. Experience smoother player movements, dynamic mob behaviors, and a more vibrant game world, all while maintaining the essence of vanilla Minecraft.
______________________________________________________________________________________________

## 🕺 Revamped Movement & Combat Animations

Experience a whole new level of fluidity with enhanced movement and combat animations. Every action, from sprinting to swordplay, feels more dynamic and immersive. Whether blocking attacks or delivering the perfect strike, the revamped animations bring a fresh layer of realism and responsiveness to your gameplay.

## 🌍 World Generation & Exploration

Venture into a beautifully reimagined Minecraft world where terrain generation is more diverse and breathtaking than ever. From towering mountains to lush forests, every biome feels more alive, with unique structures, dungeons, and secrets waiting to be uncovered. Prepare to embark on an adventure where exploration is as rewarding as survival!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jaBwFp2JO0k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

______________________________________________________________________________________________


## ⚙️ Utility & Inventory

We've refined how you interact with your inventory and tools, making everything more efficient and user-friendly. From better inventory management to innovative interfaces, these quality-of-life improvements ensure you spend less time sorting through items and more time enjoying your adventure.

## ✨ Breathtaking Visuals & UI Upgrades

Vinland Survival takes Minecraft's visuals to the next level with a carefully hand-picked selection of mods focusing on performance, clarity, and sheer aesthetic charm. Every detail, from falling leaves to enchanting particles, has been picked to create an immersive visual experience that transforms every landscape into a living masterpiece. In addition to enhanced visual effects, we've upgraded the UI, making it more intuitive and visually appealing. Explore the world with a refreshed interface and immerse yourself in the beauty of Vinland

## 🛠️ Quality Of Life and New Features

We bring a variety of quality-of-life improvements and exciting new features to enhance your Minecraft experience. These carefully selected mods streamline everyday tasks, improve usability, and introduce intuitive mechanics to make gameplay smoother and more enjoyable. From tools that make inventory management easier to mods that improve progression, crafting and exploration, each addition is carefully selected to enhance the vanilla experience without overwhelming it. Whether you're looking to streamline your workflow, customise your world, or discover new adventures, these quality-of-life and feature-rich mods will make your journey smoother and more enjoyable.

## 🔊 Sound

Vinland Survival doesn't just enhance what you see - it transforms what you hear. A selected suite of sound mods brings the game world to life with rich, dynamic audio. From the echoes of dripping water in caves to the immersive rumble of distant thunder, every sound has been refined to draw you deeper into the experience. Hear the crunch of footsteps, the whisper of wind and the ambience of a living, breathing world like never before. Let Vinland redefine your audio adventure!

| Mod                                                                 | Summary                                                                                     |
|---------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)             | Enhances the immersive experience by adding ambient sounds to different biomes and environments in Minecraft. |
| [Auditory](https://modrinth.com/mod/auditory-continued)             | Improves the audio experience by enhancing sound effects and adding depth to the game's auditory atmosphere. |
| [Coolrain](https://modrinth.com/mod/coolrain)                       | Creates ambient sounds for certain blocks during rain. |
| [Drip Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/dripsounds-fabric)           | Adds realistic dripping sounds to caves and underground areas, enhancing the environmental ambience. |
| [Dynamic Surroundings](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamicsurroundingsfabric)          | Alters the fabric of Minecraft experience by weaving a tapestry of sound and visual effects. |
| [Immersive Thunder](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder)      | Adds dynamic thunder sounds for a more immersive experience.                                   |
| [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)   | Enhances immersion by adding realistic footstep sounds that vary based on the surface being walked on. |
| [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) | Improves the realism of sound propagation in the game, making audio behave more realistically based on distance and obstacles. |
| [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound)                           | Enhances and expands the range of sound effects in Minecraft, adding more depth and variety to the auditory experience. |

______________________________________________________________________________________________

## 🎮 Play With Your Friends

Vinland Survival makes multiplayer easier than ever! A fully integrated system allows you to open your world for your friends or join theirs directly in-game without additional services or complex setups. Just launch the game and start your adventure together in seconds! Plus, we’ve included a proximity chat system for a more immersive experience, allowing you to hear nearby players and feel genuinely connected to the world of Vinland.

- [World-Host](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host) | Host singleplayer worlds online for friends to join easily.   
- [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) | Proximity voice chat.
- [PV SoundPhysics](https://modrinth.com/mod/pv-addon-soundphysics) | With this add-on Plasmo Voice will be affected by Sound Physics.

## 🛑 Setup & Important Notes
<details>
<summary>Open For More Information</summary>

### Flashback Mod ###
- The Flashback Mod only works with the following mods and resource packs disabled(they are enabled by default, so you need to turn them off if you want to record gameplay):
  1. Very Many Players mod
  2. Concurrent Chunk Management Engine mod
  3. Nature X resource pack

### How To Install The ModPack ###
  
- You can use [Modrinth Application](https://modrinth.com/app) or other launchers that can install modpacks from Modrinth, such as [PrismLaucher](https://prismlauncher.org/).
- If you use an official launcher, use the [Modrinth Pack to Zip Converter](https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/@master/) to convert it from .mrpack to .zip.

### How To Allocate More Memory ###
1. Open Instance Settings.
2. Click Java and Memory.
3. Enable Custom Memory Allocation.
4. Allocate at least 4-6GB for optimal gameplay.

### Future Work ###
- Add a quest system
- Port to 1.21.5

### Play as you want ###
Feel free to add whatever mods and resourcepacks you want, and shape it to your liking because never forget, if you can imagine it, you can do it; follow the path of your adventure.

</details>
